sign-in-dialog.description: Please log in to access all features. Please select one of the login options below to continue.
sign-in-dialog.title: Access your account

sign-out-dialog.description: Logging out of your account will end your session. You can log back in at any time.
sign-out-dialog.title: Are you sure you want to log out?

metadata.description: Feel free to explore the available projects, services and links, and don't hesitate to contact me for collaborations or other opportunities. I'm always interested in new challenges and learning opportunities.
